code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut has = false
  mut mx = 0
  mut mn = 0
  while i <= n
    mut flush = false
    if i == n
      flush = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(text, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          flush = true
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        flush = true
      end
    end
    if flush
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if not has
            mx = v
            mn = v
            has = true
          else
            if v > mx
              mx = v
            end
            if v < mn
              mn = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("max=#{mx}")
  println("min=#{mn}")
end
